live_migration_support_notes: Live migration is allowed only for configured deterministic stream/replica/materialized feed paths; otherwise require source write freeze/final partition compare.
initial_snapshot_or_seed: BACKUP/RESTORE, partition export, or SELECT/COPY per table/partition
delta_feed_or_change_capture: Replicated table metadata, Kafka/table-engine offsets, materialized-source feeds, or mutation queue evidence
proxy_method: HTTP/native protocol proxy with table/partition readiness routing
alternate_or_fallback: snapshot plus source insert freeze and final partition compare when no deterministic feed exists
required_cutover_barrier: source writes frozen or stream offsets drained; async mutations complete; parts/projections/materialized views validated
parser_worker_scope: parse donor migration commands/wire/API messages; classify route; render donor diagnostics; no execution/finality authority
sbup_role_a_scope: trusted Role A bridge/proxy/source connector after engine admission; normalizes source events to DonorLiveIngestEventRecord; invokes admitted SBLR/internal procedures only
engine_mga_rule: destination ScratchBird MGA owns target commit visibility rollback recovery cutover evidence; donor feed tokens are evidence only
proof_tests: project/tests donor regression original baseline emulation steady-state active live-migration proxy mirror crash-restart idempotent replay rollback cutover performance and support bundle proofs
